backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: fixing the company logo rendering in Header/Footer, and wiring the FinalCTASection CTA button as a mailto link to pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of brief summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and styling approach of every component and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script tag pointing to the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full marketing page by rendering all section components in order from Header through Footer.
frontend/src/components/CoreServicesSect: Displays four productized QA service cards with pricing, features, and CTA buttons; the MVP Quality Sprint card is visually featured with a Finnish blue background.
Finnish blue full-width CTA section with a mailto anchor button linking to pankaj.kumar@test2deploy.eu, trust pills, and a direct email fallback link.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Finnish blue footer displaying the company logo inside a white rounded container, contact details, smooth-scroll navigation links, dynamic copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Responsive fixed header with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll navigation links, and a 'Book a Free Call' CTA button, including a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a Finnish-themed background, headline, key checkpoints, and dual CTAs for booking a call or scrolling to services.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Four-step process section (Discovery, Test Plan, Testing Sprint, Report & Re-test) displayed in a grid with icons, a connector line on desktop, and a CTA to start a QA sprint.
frontend/src/components/IdealUseCasesSec: Grid of six use-case cards (e-commerce, fintech, mobile, SaaS, marketplace, API) plus an info panel explaining the value of outsourced QA over a full-time hire.
frontend/src/components/RealOutcomesSect: Two-column section listing five post-engagement outcomes in a checklist card, positioned alongside a heading that frames the long-term value of working with Test2Deploy.
frontend/src/components/TrustStrip.tsx: Narrow banner displaying a list of trusted industries (Fintech, SaaS, Marketplaces, etc.) with checkmark icons on a Finnish-blue background.
frontend/src/components/WhoWeHelpSection: Four-card grid targeting distinct audiences—startup founders, dev agencies, product teams, and deadline-driven teams—each with an icon, title, and short description.
frontend/src/components/WhyDifferentSect: React component rendering a 'Why Test2Deploy is Different' section with five differentiator cards (speed, startup focus, no lock-in, async communication, business-aware testing), each featuring an icon, number, title, and description.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state, persisting identity across page reloads and exposing login status flags.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts (Space Grotesk, Inter), configuring Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defining a Finnish blue-and-white CSS variable theme with custom utility classes for gradients, card hover effects, and fade-in animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Finnish flag blue/white color palette, Space Grotesk/Inter fonts, custom border radii, box shadows, and fade-in keyframe animations, plus the animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, architectural notes, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the Test2Deploy marketing website (Finnish QA consultancy single-page site with blue/white theme).
